dctools 0.0.0.9000

Descriptive "Table 1" via gtsummary

Source: R/viz.R
tbl1.Rd

Thin wrapper around gtsummary::tbl_summary() that applies project defaults (median IQR for continuous, n (%) for categorical) and optionally adds an overall column and a by-group p-value. Requires the gtsummary package.

Usage

tbl1(
  data,
  by = NULL,
  include = NULL,
  add_overall = !is.null(by),
  add_p = FALSE
)

Arguments

data

A data frame.

by

Optional grouping column, given as a string.

include

Optional character vector of columns to include (default: all).

add_overall

Logical; add an overall column (default TRUE when by is supplied).

add_p

Logical; add a group comparison p-value (default FALSE).

Value

A gtsummary table object.

On this page
